title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 388.260 - Railroad company may own and operate equipment for aerial transportation
text:
388.260.  Railroad company may own and operate equipment for aerial transportation. — Any steam railroad company operating in this state may acquire, own and operate equipment designed for aerial transportation of persons and/or property in the same manner as individuals are now or may hereafter be lawfully permitted so to do.
(RSMo 1939 § 5132) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 4659
